Fylde Ball
Tournaments Leagues About

About

Fylde 8 Ball is the home of pool in the Fylde Coast area, covering tournaments, leagues, and local competition across the region.

This site provides up-to-date information on upcoming events, results, and league standings so players and spectators can keep track of everything happening in the local pool scene.

Contact

For enquiries about tournaments or leagues, please get in touch with the organiser directly via the contact details provided at each event.
